name: archaeologicalresearchservices.com
message: [AI generated] Archaeological Research Services Ltd (ARS Ltd) is a UK-based heritage firm providing a wide range of archaeological services to clients across the world. Established in 2005, the company specializes in archaeological surveying, excavation, building recording, public outreach, research and training. They work closely with developers, engineers, architects, and public sector organizations to ensure the preservation of valuable heritage assets during development projects.
